creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
The ImageMagick port can be configured with WITHOUT_X11=yes. In this case the package name changes from ImageMagick-6.7.5.10 to ImageMagick-nox11-6.7.5.10.

Now security/p5-GD-SecurityImage requires ImageMagick as a dependency, but the dependency is specified in a way, that will NOT match the "nox11" version.

Fix: 

- change dependency on ImageMagick to check for package contents, NOT for package name
- apply the patch
How-To-Repeat: - Install graphics/ImageMagick-nox11
- try to install security/p5-GD-SecurityImage
- it will not find ImageMagick by package name:

===>   p5-GD-SecurityImage-1.71_1,1 depends on package: ImageMagick>=0 - not found
===>    Verifying install for ImageMagick>=0 in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick
